en: I'm sorry you and Angie broke up, but are you going to sit here sulking or are you going
ko: 너랑 Angie가 헤어져서 안됐는데, 여기 앉아서 삐져 있을 거야 아니면

en: to call her? I'm not calling her, guys. Why not?
ko: 전화할 거야? 전화 안 해. 왜?

en: Because if I was her, I wouldn't take me back either.
ko: 내가 걔라도 나를 다시 받아주지 않을 거니까.

en: I was really a jerk to her.
ko: 나 진짜 걔한테 못됐어.

en: I was selfish and I was too afraid to be vulnerable and lost her.
ko: 이기적이었고, 솔직해지는 게 너무 무서워서 걔를 잃었어.

en: John, that was beautiful. Just tell her that.
ko: John, 진짜 감동적이다. 그걸 그대로 말해.

en: Yeah, man.
ko: 응, 맞아.

en: She would really appreciate hearing that.
ko: 걔도 그 말 들으면 진짜 고마워할 거야.

en: Just give her a call, buddy. Tell her what you told us. Hello?
ko: 전화 한번 해봐. 우리한테 한 말 그대로 해. 여보세요?

en: Hey, Ange. It's me. Yeah, it's John. F*** you.
ko: 야, Ange. 나야. 응, John이야. 꺼져.

en: What? F*** you. No. Why are you saying that?
ko: 뭐? 꺼져. 안 돼. 왜 그런 말을 해?

en: Stop. What am I doing, dude? I'm freaking out. Say what you said earlier.
ko: 그만해. 나 뭐 하는 거야? 나 패닉이야. 아까 한 말 해.

en: Say something else. The B-word. The B-word. The B-word.
ko: 다른 거 말해. B로 시작하는 거. B로 시작하는 거. B로 시작하는 거.

en: The B-word. The B-word. The B-word.
ko: B로 시작하는 거. B로 시작하는 거. B로 시작하는 거.

en: The B-word. The B-word. You said earlier.
ko: B로 시작하는 거. B로 시작하는 거. 아까 말했잖아.

en: The B vulnerable thing. Go f*** yourself. Oh no.
ko: B 취약하다는 거. 꺼져. 안 돼.

en: Nenelecta in the first place, girly. What is she saying? You got to bail me out.
ko: 애초에 선택받을 자격 없어. 걔가 뭐라는 거야? 나 좀 구해줘.

en: You want me to talk to her? Bail me out. Talk to her. Talk to her.
ko: 내가 대신 말해줄까? 나 좀 구해줘. 대신 말해. 대신 말해.

en: Tell her I'm sorry. Please. Hi, Angie. Hey.
ko: 미안하다고 전해줘. 제발. 안녕, Angie. 안녕.

en: Sorry. I don't know what's going... F*** you. No.
ko: 미안. 무슨 일인지... 꺼져. 안 돼.

en: Oh my god. F*** you, loser. No. You mind doing it too?
ko: 세상에. 꺼져, 찐따. 안 돼. 너도 좀 해줄래?

en: Yes. I hate all of what you're working with. Don't. What is going on?
ko: 응. 네 모든 게 다 싫어. 그러지 마. 이게 무슨 일이야?

en: Get off the phone. It's me. Um.
ko: 전화 줘. 나야. 음.

en: I'm really sorry. Oh, dude. It's on mute. Oh, oops.
ko: 정말 미안해. 야. 음소거였어. 아, 이런.

en: F*** you. F*** it. Why are we so off today? Damn it, Angie.
ko: 꺼져. 됐다. 왜 우리 오늘 이 모양이야? 젠장, Angie.

en: She hung up on me. Wow. Are you serious? Very mature.
ko: 끊어버렸어. 와. 진심이야? 참 성숙하다.

en: Blew it again with the love of my life.
ko: 인생의 사랑과 또 망쳤어.

en: Yeah, I blew it with my last girlfriend, too.
ko: 응, 나도 전 여자친구랑 망쳤어.

en: By getting my penis stuck in her toilet.
ko: 걔네 변기에 그걸 끼워서.

en: Just like I blew it with Stevie.
ko: 나도 Stevie랑 망친 것처럼.

en: Every time we had sex, I'd say, I-chi-wa-wa.
ko: 할 때마다 이치와와 했거든.

en: She did not like that. But Angie wasn't like your ugly girlfriend.
ko: 걔가 싫어했어. 근데 Angie는 니 못생긴 여자친구랑은 달라.

en: She was as warm as a summer night.
ko: 여름밤처럼 따뜻한 사람이었어.

en: As sweet as a song. She was... Oh my god, she's on her way up. You motherf***er!
ko: 노래처럼 달콤한... 세상에, 걔가 올라오고 있어. 이 나쁜 놈!

en: Angie! No, no, no. Angie! Angie!
ko: 앤지! 아니, 아니, 아니. 앤지! 앤지!

en: Angie! Angie! Angie!
ko: Angie! Angie! Angie!

en: Angie!
ko: Angie!

en: Angie!
ko: Angie!
